rationale: Redundant cursor kill in finalizer; implementation/resource management bug, no specific spec rule violated.
Broken API documentation links; doc/website issue with no driver behavior or spec involvement.
BSON spec requires BsonSerializationException on corrupt BSON; driver throws other runtime exceptions or parses silently.
Regression in legacy API getReplicateStatus().getMaster() returning null; version-upgrade regression, no specific spec rule.
Incorrect ping time calculation causing continuous cluster updates and GC pressure; performance/implementation bug, no spec rule.
IllegalStateException with unhelpful message in getIndexInfo(); internal assertion error, not a spec conformance issue.
Connections left in CLOSE_WAIT after primary failure; OS socket resource leak, implementation bug with no specific spec rule.
JSON parsing efficiency improvement; performance enhancement with no spec behavior change.
DBCursor.count() vs toArray().size() discrepancy with $max; legacy API quirk, unclear if spec-mandated behavior violated.
ClassMapBasedObjectSerializer fails on POJO type; Java serialization framework bug unrelated to any spec area.
ClassAncestry memory leak preventing WebappClassLoader GC; internal memory management bug, not a spec deviation.
Javadoc improvement request for code samples and manual links; documentation enhancement only.
Tutorial doc uses deprecated authenticate() method; documentation/tutorial issue only.
WriteResult.getN() returns 0 for insert; documentation clarification request, expected server behavior for insert.
Tutorial code causes NullPointerException; documentation/tutorial code defect, user support question.
runCommand with direct connection should skip write-server selection per spec; driver incorrectly applies writable server selection.
Codec registry not propagated to RequestMessage during insertOne; internal codec wiring bug, no spec rule defines this propagation.
ObjectId generation slow due to NetworkInterface.getNetworkInterfaces() delay on tethered laptop; performance/environment issue.
Invalid Maven checksum for published artifact; packaging/build infrastructure issue, no driver behavior involved.
Higher memory allocation rate for write commands vs write protocol; performance/buffer pooling issue, no spec rule.
Connection pool exhaustion when limit reached on first query batch; internal resource management bug, not a spec conformance issue.
Character type no longer supported as field value in 3.0; Java API regression/codec gap, BSON spec doesn't mandate Character support.
100% CPU when replica set member stopped; SDAM implementation performance bug, no specific spec rule contradicted.
Bulk write upsert index mapping bug across batches; internal HashBased index map implementation defect, not a spec rule violation.
Connection pool fails to release semaphore on openAsync failure; pool resource leak implementation bug, not a specific CMAP spec rule.
MongoClient.isLocked() throws MongoSocketReadException; legacy API bug, not related to any cross-driver spec.
ConnectionPool MBean reports negative wait queue size; monitoring/JMX statistics bug, not a CMAP spec rule on event semantics.
GridFS docs say 256KB default chunk size but actual constant is 255KB; documentation discrepancy only.
updateMany Javadoc incorrectly says 'single document'; documentation-only fix.
MongoCredential Javadoc mentions MONGODB_CR instead of SCRAM-SHA-1; documentation copy-paste error only.
Server selection spec allows collStats on secondary; getStats() always uses primary read preference, contradicting the spec.
Update SDAM spec tests to latest versions; test file sync, not a driver behavior fix.
Remove outdated Javadoc referencing w=-1 in WriteConcern; documentation-only cleanup.
API docs show 256K default chunk size but should be 255K; documentation error only.
Deprecate PrimaryServerSelector and rename to WritableServerSelector; internal API refactor/rename with no behavior change.
Deprecate unused ParallelCollectionScanOptions class leaked into public API; API housekeeping, no spec impact.
Deprecate obsolete DBAddress class; API cleanup with no spec or behavior change.
Override toJson in RawBsonDocument to use more efficient codec; performance/internal optimization, no spec behavior change.
Implement connection string spec test runner; adding test infrastructure, not fixing driver behavior. Depends:DRIVERS-248.
Cross-driver docs require 'journal' parameter; Java driver only supports 'j', deviating from connection string spec.
MapReduceIterable docs don't clarify inline vs collection write default; documentation improvement only.
setObjectClass(null) throws NPE; Java null-handling bug in legacy API, no spec rule requires null to be accepted.
Document.get(String, Class) discards clazz parameter due to unchecked cast; Java type-safety bug, no spec rule violated.
JSONSerializer lacks Symbol support causing DBObject.toString() failure; JSON serialization enhancement, BSON spec doesn't mandate JSON output format.
DBObjectCodec fails to read BSON Symbol type; BSON spec defines Symbol as a valid type that codecs should handle.
GridFS reads one chunk at a time instead of batching; performance optimization, no spec rule mandates batch fetching.
GridFS locked to java.util.Date, incompatible with JodaDateTime custom decoders; Java type flexibility enhancement, no spec rule.
GridFS.findOne lacks ReadPreference parameter; API feature request/ergonomics, not a spec conformance violation.
Extra fields put on GridFSInputFile go to root document instead of metadata subdoc; GridFS API behavioral bug unclear if spec-mandated.
GridFSFile.putAll(Map) throws UnsupportedOperationException; missing API implementation, not a spec rule violation.
